# Unique Path Target

A note at `right/path/UniquePathTarget.md`. Its stem `UniquePathTarget` is unique
in this vault, so the BROKEN witness `[[wrong/path/UniquePathTarget]]` is NOT a
tuple-suffix of `("right","path","uniquepathtarget")` → it must flag C1. The old
unconditional bare-stem fallback wrongly resolved it (the stem exists) — this is
the FN the fix closes.
